holdings.infoBox: LRNZ is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cloudflare stock at 6.35%, Vicor at 6.34%, CrowdStrike Holdings at 6.17%, Snowflake at 5.90%, and Arm Holdings at 5.70%.

overview.description: The TrueShares Technology, AI & Deep Learning ETF (LRNZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed and invests in global equities focused on artificial intelligence and deep learning. LRNZ was launched on Feb 28, 2020 and is issued by Truemark Group.
